testcase.name: verifyInitiateWithPhoneMoreThan10Digits

failure.message: Success flag should be false for phone more than 10 digits

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Success flag should be false for phone more than 10 digits at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89) at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42) at org.junit.Assert.assertFalse(Assert.java:65) at apiTests.PayinInitiateIntentApiTest.verifyInitiateWithPhoneMoreThan10Digits(PayinInitiateIntentApiTest.java:301) at Request method: POST Request URI: https://api.payshack.in/payshack-payin/api/v1/payin/ext/txn/initiate-intent Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: secret-key=0aecf680-970c-4938-a3e0-2177d293820d client-id=d6ae4e22-412e-4a0d-aed1-a3fae802d68b Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "encryptedBody": "ufLJvWE3ehCTwqWp1zuaf0nSTvFSZJwO8jkoeqUbaALVN6LJs4hjBZsrBpZTRIaEaoCPETwcqtBz1Trh2IpAZbpkqwzsG7RoDgUTvf27dlpB6g1aEZQjp/S2O+3NeQ2WKZ6+EgABjV5ImCICeV+Yz77rBJ6FaliuEoJfadXeOZvsIxzPydGzBQfcjqTZYxdqxdo9ibw9IEUGRY9L6YXRlPMaqTfPewMRaaGdmPer38EGcGLv9GF86gsbEPa+x+6i", "checksum": "faf0a4010944a74a452090a13c6ac053657c545c7114f34951938e2bd148da73" } HTTP/1.1 200 OK Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 Content-Length: 527 Connection: keep-alive Date: Wed, 17 Jun 2026 12:38:35 GMT vary: Origin access-control-allow-origin: * Server: APISIX/2.15.1

testcase.name: verifyPaymentUrlIsGenerated
testcase.system-out:
Request method: POST Request URI: https://api.payshack.in/payshack-payin/api/v1/payin/ext/txn/initiate-intent Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: secret-key=0aecf680-970c-4938-a3e0-2177d293820d client-id=d6ae4e22-412e-4a0d-aed1-a3fae802d68b Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "encryptedBody": "ufLJvWE3ehCTwqWp1zuaf0nSTvFSZJwO8jkoeqUbaALVN6LJs4hjBZsrBpZTRIaEaoCPETwcqtBz1Trh2IpAZWD6AO8AjdR0Jd3zEZsCpRieMa01XYbvPtQxmnhya4/npntiTCJWH5yS100hbB1U3bQcpXq2i6MJXzuJzCkmBkivDk7+X38d42yE9vQshdiXE5Ykznbq/GgRHYynFWQSw0IicdgUYFkvfvzKDaEtAy7UawW/AflEQ6WU1fR4LMKT", "checksum": "0e2081b6de6d99f5520b2ad1c7b2fcda260995d396b4a7b92cfb1e972a103fe8" } HTTP/1.1 200 OK Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 Content-Length: 527 Connection: keep-alive Date: Wed, 17 Jun 2026 12:38:37 GMT vary: Origin access-control-allow-origin: * Server: APISIX/2.15.1
{ "timestamp": "2026-06-17T12:38:37.607Z", "statusCode": 200, "status": "OK", "message": "Transaction Initiated Successfully", "success": true, "data": "" } Initiate Decrypted Response is : {"orderId":"JFLTMF6HIG2HPD9AR86I","txnRefId":"S9ERSS202661760836","paymentUrl":"upi://pay?pa=disanessentialspri351023@ypbiz&pn=Disan+Essentials+Private+Limited&cu=INR&tn=Pay+to+Disan+Essentials+Private+Limited&am=100.00&mam=100.00&mc=5311&mode=04&tr=AIRPAY1958721662&ver=1"}

Request method: POST Request URI: https://api.payshack.in/payshack-payin/api/v1/payin/ext/txn/initiate-intent Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: secret-key=0aecf680-970c-4938-a3e0-2177d293820d client-id=d6ae4e22-412e-4a0d-aed1-a3fae802d68b Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "encryptedBody": "ufLJvWE3ehCTwqWp1zuaf0nSTvFSZJwO8jkoeqUbaALVN6LJs4hjBZsrBpZTRIaEaoCPETwcqtBz1Trh2IpAZdzzKD1uzAwFFBhf0Sky6MI31sWGoZ7MqK4NXQ6qsNoduesvi6n4Vo6FRA9n+ClJ4YZBZ+NsOTq23VqhaLG2ZyuN2/ESTB2awO4W0fjInhyAldPKi87dc+egn6a/Zgsfoy9sxXFbiqyhwU9jaEuIUZpVACjJHV4h1U91DqVJFujH", "checksum": "27fa4088a7e58891acea074d3518c93b62bab823e43cd8be4fcaea1021876a96" } HTTP/1.1 200 OK Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 Content-Length: 463 Connection: keep-alive Date: Wed, 17 Jun 2026 12:38:38 GMT vary: Origin access-control-allow-origin: * Server: APISIX/2.15.1

testcase.name: verifyInitiatePayinTransactionWithAmountMoreThan10000
testcase.system-out:
Request method: POST Request URI: https://api.payshack.in/payshack-payin/api/v1/payin/ext/txn/initiate-intent Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: secret-key=0aecf680-970c-4938-a3e0-2177d293820d client-id=d6ae4e22-412e-4a0d-aed1-a3fae802d68b Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "encryptedBody": "ufLJvWE3ehCTwqWp1zuaf0nSTvFSZJwO8jkoeqUbaALVN6LJs4hjBZsrBpZTRIaEvFHI4MuaqDpZLyQZo+IPv9GE/iabDA3BJaJlzH2O9PZDo9rBppEhXDjYJK1JCk+RhwlRF3mFVDcuKKNNo09dDB3wiwO5KjhMHUNH81zfuzK5YYQxe/BWhzbedi+AJRThbgLTTTPa65qKAXnie01NcYMf81Q67ORcx/f+dY2Aqkuzt0SCsfD8xVmUFOUfbi7O", "checksum": "1df6d190f7e514b38a9f2ad124aa65065e02e2fe85fa04c16dc710a972e4204d" } HTTP/1.1 500 Internal Server Error Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 Content-Length: 158 Connection: keep-alive Date: Wed, 17 Jun 2026 12:38:39 GMT vary: Origin access-control-allow-origin: * Server: APISIX/2.15.1 X-APISIX-Upstream-Status: 500
{ "timestamp": "2026-06-17T12:38:39.856Z", "statusCode": 500, "status": "Internal Server Error", "message": "Amount should not be greater than 10000", "success": false } Request Payload for amount more than 10000 : {"firstName":"pavan","lastName":"kumar","amount":"10001","orderId":"J657I77MDEJFFT72LYFH","phone":"8970411423","userIP":"10.210.10","userId":"dddd","email":"pmkirru33@gmail.com"} Response Body for amount more than 10000 : {"timestamp":"2026-06-17T12:38:39.856Z","statusCode":500,"status":"Internal Server Error","message":"Amount should not be greater than 10000","success":false}

testcase.name: verifyInitiateWithPhoneNumberHavingCountryCode

failure.message: Success flag should be false for phone with +91 country code

testcase.name: verifyInitiateSuccessFlagIsTrue
testcase.system-out:
Request method: POST Request URI: https://api.payshack.in/payshack-payin/api/v1/payin/ext/txn/initiate-intent Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: secret-key=0aecf680-970c-4938-a3e0-2177d293820d client-id=d6ae4e22-412e-4a0d-aed1-a3fae802d68b Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "encryptedBody": "ufLJvWE3ehCTwqWp1zuaf0nSTvFSZJwO8jkoeqUbaALVN6LJs4hjBZsrBpZTRIaEaoCPETwcqtBz1Trh2IpAZdBS0L7dadc6uM7hA7sbOlccj9WLV7VH3lefMQzj/cAd1C9wRDsP6fgyUhMd1S7wIYGPmEURVRLaOGJvg0RsEsKok5bxyETsByo4FtHJ3TmwsN8iMqOZz6Ctrbb0QZNnjSm6JfDdjdS2Pw2p/iF8OzNwqy2AguSj9S7u9e5LPlPV", "checksum": "eccb36cd27f0a112f47430d96259413d4fe89a5a2860707b94c2bd8a78d5aaf7" } HTTP/1.1 200 OK Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 Content-Length: 463 Connection: keep-alive Date: Wed, 17 Jun 2026 12:38:44 GMT vary: Origin access-control-allow-origin: * Server: APISIX/2.15.1

testcase.name: verifyInitiateWithInvalidEmailFormat

failure.message: Success flag should be false for invalid email

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Success flag should be false for invalid email at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89) at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42) at org.junit.Assert.assertFalse(Assert.java:65) at apiTests.PayinInitiateIntentApiTest.verifyInitiateWithInvalidEmailFormat(PayinInitiateIntentApiTest.java:273) at testcase.name: verifyPaymentUrlContainsTxnRefId

testcase.name: verifyOrderIdMatchesRequestOrderId
testcase.system-out:
